deployment_question: How does the model perform on molecules in chemical neighborhoods absent from training?
definition: Embed molecules with UMAP or a related manifold method, cluster the embedding, and hold out clusters as a harder molecular generalization point.

split_operator.spectra_mapping: samples low-overlap regions of a molecular neighborhood graph

implementation_recipe: Compute molecular features and UMAP embedding with a fixed seed.
Cluster the embedding using a declared clustering algorithm.
Hold out clusters and audit train-neighbor similarity in original feature space.
quality_gates: Validate that held-out clusters have lower train-neighbor similarity than scaffold splits.
Check sensitivity to UMAP random seed.
failure_modes: Low-dimensional clusters can distort original chemical distances.

citations.title: UMAP-based clustering split for rigorous evaluation of AI models for virtual screening
citations.evidence: Reports UMAP clustering creates a more challenging benchmark than random, scaffold, or Butina splits.

citations.title: On the Best Way to Cluster NCI-60 Molecules
citations.evidence: Compares molecular clustering methods and recommends UMAP clustering for NCI-60 molecules.
